name: mantis-verdict
description: Cross-engine verdict synthesizer. Composes M1/M2/M5/M6/M7 outputs into DEPLOY/HOLD/FAIL verdicts per the threshold contract in CLAUDE.md. Publishes mantis.review.completed events (Phase 2) or writes to verdict.jsonl (Phase 1). Weaver's pre-commit gate subscribes; FAIL refuses auto-commit.
